top.title: Iran's intelligence minister Esmail Khatib killed in air strike
top.summary: Israel said it had killed Khatib, whose death was confirmed by Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian on Wednesday.

top.title: 'Very difficult to stop': BBC visits scene of Iran cluster bomb strike on Israel
top.summary: An elderly couple was killed after a bomb flew into their apartment in central Israel and exploded.

top.title: Russian archaeologist can be sent to Ukraine for trial, Polish judge rules
top.summary: Archaeologist Alexander Butyagin is accused of conducting illegal excavations in Crimea - Ukraine's peninsula annexed by Russia.

top.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
top.summary: However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

top.title: Quantum pioneers win Turing Award for encryption breakthrough
top.summary: It is hoped Charles H Bennett and Gilles Brassard's work will make digital communications secure for decades ahead.

top.title: Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned
top.summary: The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."
